name: valerius-forge
title: Valerius Forge
description: Forge AI-ready agent prompts and project briefs
author: fratresmedai

commands.name: forge
commands.title: Forge Prompt
commands.description: Forge an AI agent prompt or project brief

commands.name: forge-selection
commands.title: Forge Selection
commands.description: Forge a prompt from your current selection

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your API key for the selected provider

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Model to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-opus-4-5, gemini-2.0-flash)

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Base URL (Local only)
preferences.description: Only needed for local LLMs like Ollama
